# services.artalk

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.artalk`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.artalk.allowModify` | `boolean` | allow Artalk store the settings to config file persistently |
| `services.artalk.configFile` | `string` | Artalk config file path. If it is not exist, Artalk will generate one. |
| `services.artalk.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable artalk, a comment system. |
| `services.artalk.group` | `string` | Artalk group name. |
| `services.artalk.package` | `package` | The artalk package to use. |
| `services.artalk.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | The artalk configuration. If you set allowModify to true, Artalk will be able to store the settings in the config file persistently. This section's content will update in the config file after the service restarts. Options containing secret data should be set to an attribute set containing the attribute `_secret` - a string pointing to a file containing the value the option should be set to. |
| `services.artalk.settings.host` | `string` | Artalk server listen host |
| `services.artalk.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Artalk server listen port |
| `services.artalk.user` | `string` | Artalk user name. |
| `services.artalk.workdir` | `string` | Artalk working directory |
